flags.claim: Albert Einstein invented the telephone in 1920.
flags.evidence: light beams. In 1946, a driver in Saint Louis, Mo. placed the first cell phone call in history. The cell phone was invented by Bell Labs and future AT&T CEO, H.I Romnes. References Related pages Computer network Radio wa
